scripts.preinstall: node -e "if(!(process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'').startsWith('pnpm')){console.error('Use pnpm instead');process.exit(1)}const fs=require('fs');for(const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'])fs.rmSync(f,{force:true})"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
